workPackages.title: Release AGID interoperability contracts
workPackages.publicGood: prevents AMT, ZK, postal, validation, and AI layers from drifting apart
workPackages.privacyBoundary: contains no address content or personal delivery artifacts

workPackages.title: No-postcode AGID to proof-compatible demo
verification: npm run verify in each repository
workPackages.publicGood: shows how regions without postal codes can still use open, privacy-preserving address infrastructure
workPackages.privacyBoundary: uses commitments, roots, state names, and policy identifiers only

workPackages.title: Backend-only validation conformance
deliverables: country model examples for strong, weak, and missing postal-code regions
workPackages.publicGood: provides a FOSS validation core separate from commercial app code
workPackages.privacyBoundary: returns quality state, AGID reference, and postal-equivalent status only

workPackages.title: ZK-ready proof boundary
workPackages.publicGood: defines how address predicates can be verified without disclosing address content
workPackages.privacyBoundary: does not claim audited circuit security

workPackages.title: Formal Address Morphism Theory core
workPackages.publicGood: turns safe address resolution and abstention into reusable research infrastructure
workPackages.privacyBoundary: proof validity cannot upgrade unsafe resolution

workPackages.title: Country and region repository governance
workPackages.publicGood: makes global address data maintenance transparent and reusable
workPackages.privacyBoundary: stores public region metadata and source policy, not personal address material

workPackages.title: Security, privacy, and release hardening
workPackages.publicGood: turns the prototypes into trustworthy shared infrastructure
workPackages.privacyBoundary: focuses on reviewability, not production deployment claims
